overview: TruNorth provides testosterone optimization for men with low testosterone or andropause, starting with comprehensive lab work and physical exams. Personalized treatment plans are developed and regularly adjusted; the clinic also offers GLP-1 weight loss medications and erectile dysfunction treatment.
highlights: Lab work and physical exam evaluation
Personalized treatment plans with regular adjustments
targetAudience: Men experiencing low testosterone or andropause symptoms; also serves anyone seeking GLP-1 weight loss treatment.
